metadata.title: Synthetic Aggregate Model Evaluation
metadata.purpose: Demonstrate aggregate performance and calibration reporting.
metadata.population: Synthetic validation cohort; no real persons or records.

intended_use: Research evaluation only; not for patient care or live clinical use.
prohibited_uses: No diagnosis, treatment recommendation, dosing, triage, alarm, or autonomous decision.
No claim of clinical validity, utility, safety, fairness, authorization, or compliance.
limitations: Aggregate bins cannot estimate calibration slope.
Subgroup differences are descriptive and do not determine fairness.

governance.version_and_change_control: Lock model, threshold, data, code, and report versions; independently validate every change.
governance.monitoring: Define aggregate calibration, discrimination, subgroup, drift, failure, and incident review.
governance.auditability: Retain provenance, commands, versions, reviewer decisions, and unresolved findings without sensitive data.
governance.human_factors: Document intended users and offline usability evidence; live evaluation is outside this skill.
governance.rollback_and_retirement: Define rollback, suspension, and retirement triggers before release.
